thinking: Candidate A completely misidentifies the spectrum as crystalline graphite (D-band of sp² carbon) and fabricates explanations around absent G/2D bands that are inconsistent with real graphite; this directly contradicts the ground-truth h-BN E₂g assignment at ~1366 cm⁻¹.
